_meta.name: Heimdall
_meta.note: TUI 'typography' = a monospace cell grid + SGR terminal attributes. There are no font families, point sizes, or line-heights. Emphasis is expressed with bold / faint / italic / underline / reverse. Colour role names reference docs/design/identity/palette.json (the colour source of record); this file owns only the attribute layer.

family.mono: terminal default monospace (inherited from the user's terminal; not specified by the app)
family.rationale: A TUI must render in the user's chosen terminal font. Heimdall assumes a fixed-width cell grid and selects no web/desktop font. All glyphs used (box-drawing, block elements, braille, the listed status symbols) are standard Unicode and degrade to an ASCII set under TERM=dumb.

principles: No web fonts, point sizes, rems, or line-heights — those concepts do not exist in a cell grid.
Emphasis is an SGR attribute, never a size change.
Attributes reinforce meaning but never carry it alone: every state is glyph + text (see palette.state_glyph_legend).
The SGR 'faint/dim' attribute is decorative only. Muted/stale legibility comes from a solid AA-passing colour, so meaning survives even where a terminal renders faint weakly or not at all.
Italic is optional: terminals that lack it fall back to the listed fallback attribute with no loss of meaning.

attributes._doc: The terminal attribute vocabulary (SGR codes) available to roles below.

bold.use: titles, headings, metric values, error/refused labels

faint.use: muted text, stale rows, dimmed overlay backdrop

reverse.use: focused / selected row; focus indicator that works even under NO_COLOR

roles._doc: Named type roles. color = palette colour role (resolved per active theme); attributes = SGR list; glyph = leading marker where the role owns one.

heading.use: panel / section headers (HOST DETAIL, FEDERATION, HELP)

label.use: column headers and field labels (HOST, CPU%, ORIGIN, target)

value.use: metric values / numbers (72%, 74°C, 142W) — bold so data leads

unit.use: units / suffixes next to a value (%, °C, W, ms, GB)

muted.use: de-emphasised text; AA via colour, not the dim attribute

keybinding.use: key letters in the footer (q, r, L, v, ⏎)

input_active.use: active filter text field; ▏ marks the cursor (focus-visible)

focus.use: focused / selected row — reverse video + leading ▸, never colour alone

overlay_backdrop.use: grid dimmed behind a modal overlay (help / detail)

state_emphasis._doc: Extra attribute layered on a status badge, by state. Colour + glyph come from palette.state_glyph_legend; this only adds emphasis. [] = no extra attribute.

fidelity._doc: Render-mode hooks (wireframe 0004). Attributes that switch off as fidelity degrades.

degraded.attributes: bold/underline/reverse only; faint and italic dropped; colours dropped under NO_COLOR
